mrp_clause_text: 2. SSA Amendments. Unless expressly specified otherwise, the following amendments to the SSA shall be effective from the Amendment Effective Date: 2.1. Revised Fixed Solar Discount. In anticipation of the expansion of the Facility, the value of the Fixed Solar Discount set forth in Part I of the SSA is hereby amended from 18.5% and restated as 19.5%. The Current Grid Tariff (Year-1) and Discounted Solar Tariff (Year-1) set forth in Part I of the SSA along with their corresponding values shall be deemed deleted in their entirety. 2.2. Revised Floor Solar Tariff (Year-1). In anticipation of the expansion of the Facility, the value of the Floor Solar Tariff (Year-1) set forth in Part I of the SSA is hereby amended from 0.1199 USD/kWh and restated as 0.0874 USD/kWh.
notes: This appears to be an amendment to a solar service agreement that revises the fixed solar discount from 18.5% to 19.5% and lowers the floor solar tariff from $0.1199/kWh to $0.0874/kWh. The document mentions deletion of Current Grid Tariff and Discounted Solar Tariff values but does not show the actual MRP calculation formula.
